steps: Sign up for a TaxJar account (Professional plan required for API access)
Once logged in, navigate to Account > TaxJar API

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your TaxJar API token, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: API access requires a TaxJar Professional or Business plan — no free tier for API
A sandbox environment is available at https://sandbox.taxjar.com for testing without live data
Sandbox API tokens are separate from production tokens
Rate limits apply per plan; Professional allows 10,000 API calls per month

test_endpoint.description: List all tax categories — simple read-only endpoint requiring no parameters
